formulas.name: Purine and Pyrimidine Structures
formulas.notes: Purines: Adenine (A) and Guanine (G), Pyrimidines: Cytosine (C), Thymine (T), Uracil (U)

variables.n: Number of carbon atoms in the chain

formulas.name: Lipid Formula
formulas.notes: Lipids: Fats, Oils, Waxes, Steroids, Phospholipids and Sphingolipids

formulas.name: Nucleic Acid Structure
formulas.notes: Nucleic acids: DNA (deoxyribonucleic acid) and RNA (ribonucleic acid)

formulas.name: Protein Structure
formulas.notes: Proteins: Primary structure, Secondary structure, Tertiary structure and Quaternary structure

formulas.name: Vitamins and Hormones
formulas.notes: Vitamins: Fat-soluble vitamins and water-soluble vitamins, Hormones: Steroid hormones, Peptide hormones and Amino acid hormones
